name: Log4Shell Evasion Pattern in Flows
notes: This rule triggers when potential Remote Code Execution related to Log4Shell Exploit (CVE-2021-44228) is observed. This could indicate an attacker bypassing it via techniques such as system environment variables, lower or upper lookup, invalid unicode characters with upper, system properties, html url encoding and notations.
conditions_text: when any of HTTP Host, HTTP Referrer, HTTP User Agent, HTTP GET Request (custom) match (?i)(\$|%24)(\{|%7[bB])(lower|upper|env|::-\w+|base64)
TD_list: APPLY Log4Shell Evasion Pattern in Flows on flows which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when any of HTTP Host, HTTP Referrer, HTTP User Agent, HTTP GET Request (custom) match (?i)(\$|%24)(\{|%7[bB])(lower|upper|env|::-\w+|base64)
RED_list: Event description: Detects when potential Remote Code Execution related to Log4Shell Exploit (CVE-2021-44228) is observed. This could indicate an attacker bypassing it via techniques such as system environment variables, lower or upper lookup, invalid unicode characters with upper, system properties, html url encoding and notations.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
